did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The study used line-field confocal optical coherence tomography (LC-OCT) for imaging and univariate/multivariable multinomial logistic regression for statistical analysis of histological correlations. No AI, machine learning, or deep learning methods were employed to obtain the diagnostic results or imaging features.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
